steps.title: Identify slope and intercept
steps.content:
$$f(x)=8x+4$$
The function is in slope‑intercept form $y=mx+b$. The slope $m=8$ represents the estimated growth in feet per year. The y‑intercept $b=4$ gives the height when $x=0$.

steps.title: Find the initial height
steps.content:
$$f(0)=8\cdot0+4=4$$
When the tree was first measured ($x=0$), its estimated height is 4 feet. That matches choice D — D is correct.
